mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TPR701 ( FACTORY_CODE, WORKCENTER_CODE, PROCESS_TYPE, WORK_DATE, WORK_ORDER_NO, ITEM_NAME, ITEM_CODE, PROD_QTY, GOOD_QTY, BAD_QTY, BAD_RATE, WORK_TIME, QTY_PER_HOUR, REG_DT, REG_ID ) VALUES ( #{factoryCode}, #{workcenterCode}, #{processType}, #{workDate}, #{workOrderNo}, #{itemName}, #{itemCode}, #{prodQty}, #{goodQty}, #{badQty}, #{badRate}, #{workTime}, #{qtyPerHour}, CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), GETDATE(), 120), #{regId} )
